description: Composition:100% polo t-shirt in black with white and green stripes Wash care:Machine wash separately in cold water. Use mild detergent. Do not bleach. Avoid soaking. Remove promptly. Line dry inside out in shade. Warm iron only. Do not iron directly on print/embroidery.Fitting:Regular FitSummer's here and it's all about blending colours for that trendy look. This black tee from classic polo, with its perfect belnd of white and green stripes, will accentuate your style statement. A perfect wear for outings when teamed with casuals. Model statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.11", Shoulders-18"
